The source map comment is standard for development environments. There are no signs of obfuscation, malicious code, or external data leaks.\n\n---\n\n### Review of Each Report:\n\n#### **Report 1**\n- **Purpose:** Basic sorting\n- **Analysis:** Correctly identifies that the code is simple, non-obfuscated, and does not contain malicious constructs.\n- **Scores:** malware=0, securityRisk=0.1, confidence=0.9\n- **Assessment:** Reasonable.
